narrative:
Falls Twp township has 7,247 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.3 percentage points.
